brand.name: Horrordex
brand.footer: Horrordex MVP is a static Jamstack archive. Live numbers are refreshed at build time from JSON, then deployed to the edge.

seo.homeTitle: Horrordex Entity Matrix | Roblox Horror & Backrooms Database
seo.homeDescription: Static MVP for Horrordex: Roblox horror entity dossiers, Backrooms survival guides, build-time telemetry, and edge-ready SEO pages.

The Backrooms.description: Backrooms lore, survival guides, entity-adjacent records, and liminal horror recommendations collected into one static archive.
The Backrooms.focus: Backrooms lore, survival routes, and related horror guides

Horror Games.description: Horror game rankings, co-op scare recommendations, indie dread picks, and evergreen player guides for modern horror discovery.
Horror Games.focus: Horror game rankings, recommendations, and evergreen buyer guidance

Roblox.description: Roblox beginner guides, safety notes, onboarding help, and horror-game discovery routes for new players.
Roblox.focus: Roblox setup, safety, and game discovery

Minecraft.description: Minecraft survival guidance focused on first-day routing, progression, food, shelter, mining, and long-term base planning.

Crazy Games.description: Browser game rankings and quick-play recommendations built for no-download discovery, school-break sessions, and casual competition.
Crazy Games.focus: Browser game rankings and fast no-download play

Casual Games.description: Low-pressure game recommendations across browser, puzzle, cozy, and sandbox categories for readers who want relaxing sessions.

Sandbox Games.description: Sandbox and building-game recommendations covering survival crafting, creativity, automation, co-op worlds, and long-form progression.
Sandbox Games.focus: Sandbox building and survival crafting recommendations

Roblox DOORS.description: Entity-focused records tied to Roblox horror, readable chase mechanics, and player-facing survival context.
Roblox DOORS.focus: Roblox horror entities and chase survival
